title: Manifestation of the souls
description: Manifest your soul as a stand, kill bosses, follow quest lines and find structures
body:
PLAY IN 1.21.1

anifestation of the Souls is a mod inspired by JoJo, a Japanese manga written by Araki. This mod introduces a new way of fighting, building, and playing, allowing users to fully experience the JoJo world—from having an army of stands to building traps to even achieving heaven. 

In Manifestation of the Souls, everyone can get a stand. Each stand is unique and has its own pros and cons for fighting. Each stand has its own playstyle, with some focusing on stealth, some on attack, some on trap-making, and others purely on utility. Some stands also allow turning normal mobs into stand users, potentially giving you the ability to create an army.

You can also remotely control your stand. Each stand has its maximum distance from you and its own characteristics.

There are currently 11 stands

 

The world 

The World is a short-range stand with high damage and the ability to stop time at will. Make sure to be the strongest and the only one able to move in the frozen world!

undefined

Killer queen


Killer Queen is a short-range stand that allows you to turn entities into bombs. This stand also has a remote-controlled tank (Sheer Heart Attack), enabling you to set traps to outsmart your enemies.

 

Crazy diamond

Crazy Diamond is a short-range stand with powerful attack damage that allows you to repair anything—from fixing items to breaking blocks to create traps. These traps can then be restored with the press of a key, enabling you to set up and reuse them effectively.

undefined

King crimson

King Crimson is a short-range stand with strong damage power. It allows you to erase time, avoiding damage and positioning yourself in the best spot to then surprise your enemy with a powerful attack.

 

White snake

White Snake is a long-range stand with low damage that allows you to remove stands from players and mobs in the form of disks. These disks contain the stand's power and abilities, meaning you can give a stand to entities, enabling you to create an army of them.

undefined

Cmoon

C-Moon is a long-range stand with medium damage that allows you to bend gravity, giving you great versatility. Each attack you make will also invert the enemy's gravity center, causing them to take damage.

 

Made in heaven 

Made in Heaven is the final evolution of C-Moon. This stand allows you to control the universe's acceleration, enabling you to slow it down or speed it up. While the universe accelerates, you move with it, while everyone else does not, making you incredibly fast and allowing you to speed blitz your enemies.

undefined

Diver down

Diver Down is a medium-range stand with medium damage. This stand allows you to phase through walls while using the pilot, and you can also store the kinetic energy of an attack inside an entity to later release a huge burst

 

Dirty Deeds, Done Dirt Cheap

Dirty Deeds, Done Dirt Cheap is a short-range stand with high damage. This stand allows you to travel through dimensions, even bringing dimensional clones of yourself that will follow your orders. It also enables you to transfer your soul into their bodies, healing you in the process.

undefined

Wonder of you

Wonder of You is a long-range stand that allows you to pursue and cause calamity to everything that is attacking you or targeting you, making it the perfect defense with few counters.

 

Weather report

Weather report is a medium range stand that allow you to manipulate the air and the weather to fight or to make traps.

 

Soft and wet

Soft & Wet is a versatile Stand that excels in both close-quarters combat and unique bubble-based abilities, it utilizes various bubble effects that can be modified to adapt to different situations.

 

There are multiple items such as Stand arrows, Jesus corpse parts and a lot more, check the wiki for more info
